title: Hyper (Discontinued)
body:
Hyper adds many powerful mobs to minecraft, some being able to defeat other strong modded bosses like Ignis, Cumulonimbus, & The Apostle

_Credits to [Scooty's PVZ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scootys-plants-vs-zombies) for letting me use their zombie texture and invasion flag concept_

<details>
<summary>Mod Showcase</summary>

**Full playlist:** _[click!](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLozH1GdhpHM5E1AoPTHKuFypa2R7gAxs7 'Title') (includes outdated reviews)_

</details>

<details>
<summary>Current Items</summary>

**Hyper Evoker** - Totem of Wrath, Orb of Magic, Evocation Wand\
**Hyper Creeper** - Detonation Catalyst, Glowing Gunpowder, Explosion Charge\
**Hyper Enderman** - Suspicious End Crystal, Mystic Ender Pearl, Ender Pearl Staff\
**Super Skeleton** - Cage of Souls, Energized Bone, Bone Staff, Skeletal Boots\
**Hyper Blaze** - Overheating Core, Blazing Scrap, Flare Strike Charger\
**Hyper Shulker** - Ender Shulk Heart, Shell of Eternal Density, Shulker Blast Cannon, End Resistant Shell\
**Hyper Wither** - Dome of Stars, Eternal Star, Star Shield\
**Super Zombie** - Energetic Overcharge, Hyper Essence, Charged Hyper Essence, Super Excalibur, Energy Charger, Sweetened Coffee\
**Hyper Warden** - Wretched Sculk Construct, Sculk Cataclysm Eye, Laser Sight\
**Miscellaneous** - Orb of Water, Warbringer, Energy Gatherer, Magma Charm, Easy Mode Flag, Normal Mode Flag, Hard Mode Flag\
_**Creative Only**_ - Sonic Boom, Void Bucket, Reality Blade

</details>

<details>
<summary>Weakest to Strongest (among other things)</summary>

**Hyper Strider** is a friendly protector that can help in journeys as it can be mounted & has immunity to cold in the overworld, shift right-clicking it will give it special effects

The **Easy Mode Flag** is beatable with mid-tier gear\
The **Normal Mode Flag** is beatable with higher-tier gear\
The **Hard Mode Flag** is beatable with the mod's gear

**Hyper Evoker** is the first boss\
**Hyper Creeper** & his charged form is the second boss\
**Hyper Enderman** is the third boss\
**Super Skeleton** is the fourth boss\
**Hyper Blaze** is the fifth boss\
**Hyper Shulker** is the sixth boss\
**Hyper Wither** is the seventh boss\
**Super Zombie** & his charged form is the strongest boss\
**Hyper Warden** is the final boss

**Hyper Zombie**, **Hyper Witch** & **Hyper Villager** are creative-only, so they aren't ranked

</details>
